synopsis: ARC Trooper Echo has a plan to save Anaxes: infiltrate the Separaitst base, feed misinformation to Admiral Trench, and give secret intel to the Republic. The mission is a true test of Echo’s loyalties and of his comrades’ trust. Even with Anakin Skywalker, Obi-Wan Kenobi, Mace Windu, Captain Rex, and the Bad Batch, outsmarting Admiral Trench is far from easy. The Bad Batch arc of Clone Wars Season Seven concludes in truly explosive fashion!
title: Unfinished Business
